title: Project Admin
description:
Job Responsibilities
(1)    Handle project documentation submission, tracking and filing;

(2)    Prepare and submit documents to clients, consultants and relevant authorities;

(3)    Maintain proper records including and not limited to catalogue, drawings, correspondence and approvals;

(4)    Support the project team in administrative and coordination tasks;

(5)    Attend project meetings and prepare minutes of meeting;

(6)    Assist with general project administration duties as required;

(7)    All other ad-hoc tasks as assigned by reporting manager.

Job Requirement
(1)   Diploma or Degree in any related field;

(2)   Experience in document control/ document submission for construction will be an advantages;

(3)   Well-organised, detail-oriented and able to meet deadlines;

(4)   Proficient in Microsoft Office applications；

(5)   No prior experience are welcome to apply;

(6) Ability to communicate effectively with Chinese colleagues and stakeholders.


Workplace address: 18 Attap Valley Rd, Singapore 759910
Work Schedule: 5 working days, Mon to Fri, 8.30am to 5.30pm

postedCompany.description:
Since 1979, when Kanto Chemical Co., Inc. developed and designed chemical supply equipment for the semiconductor manufacturing industry, we have achieved outstanding success across various electronics sectors, including semiconductors, wafer foundries, LCD flat panel displays, and solar cells. To date, we have completed over 3,000 system engineering installations worldwide, covering Japan, Taiwan, China, South Korea, the United States, and Europe.

We maintain a consistent standard of excellence throughout every stage of the process, from design and assembly to installation, construction, and maintenance, which has earned us high praise from numerous clients. Furthermore, we continually enhance our technical services related to chemical supply systems, including equipment diagnostics, inspections, and maintenance, in order to provide diversified engineering solutions and superior quality to better serve our customers.

In line with our commitment to clients and to implement a localized development strategy that boosts integration and service efficiency, KANTO-PPC Inc. officially transferred its chemical dispense system engineering operations in Taiwan and Mainland China to the Taiwan-Japan joint venture, Cica-Huntek Chemical Technology Taiwan Co., Ltd., effective May 1, 2014. This new company inherits Kanto Chemical’s 27 years of professional expertise and high-quality standards in Taiwan, delivering top-tier equipment and system engineering services. We aspire to become the leading brand for chemical dispense systems in the Asia-Pacific region and remain dedicated to achieving this goal.


● Quality：Leading edge technology, Clean and stable supply of chemicals.

● Safety：Leakage protection, Corrosion protection, Explosion proof.

● Automatic supply, Energy-saving measures.

● Safe Operation：Safe and Stable operation by reliable and accumu lated know-how system.

● Environment：Environmental measures, Recycling system.


We believe in the value of every team member. With a supportive work environment and space to learn and grow, we welcome talented individuals to join our journey.
postedCompany.name: CHCT SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
